Common.title: Vireo
Common.deleteReminder: Reminder: This action cannot be undone

IndexPage.title: Vireo
IndexPage.description: Organize your job search. Stay productive — even offline.
IndexPage.subtext: A local‑first job‑tracking app built for real‑world reliability.
IndexPage.microBenefit: No signup required. Works offline instantly.

localFirst.title: Local‑First Architecture
localFirst.description: Your data stays on your device — fast, private, and reliable.

offlineReady.title: Offline‑Ready PWA
offlineReady.description: Install Vireo and work anywhere, even without internet.

cloudSync.title: Cloud Sync (Beta)
cloudSync.description: Seamless backup and multi‑device access coming soon.

reminders.title: Smart Reminders
reminders.description: Gentle nudges to follow up, apply, or prepare for interviews.

crossPlatform.title: Cross‑Platform
crossPlatform.description: Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile — one experience everywhere.

localFirstDetail.title: Why local‑first matters
localFirstDetail.description: Traditional apps wait for servers. Local‑first apps wait for no one. By prioritizing your local device, Vireo provides a seamless, secure, and blazing-fast experience.

privacy.title: Complete Privacy
privacy.description: Your job search is personal. Local‑first means your data stays on your device by default.

speed.title: Native Speed
speed.description: No loading spinners. Every action is instantaneous because it happens locally first.

offline.title: Always Ready
offline.description: Work anywhere — on a plane, a train, or in a coffee shop with spotty Wi-Fi.

pwa.title: Install Vireo — your job search companion.
pwa.description: Vireo is a Progressive Web App (PWA). You can install it directly from your browser for quick access — no app store required.
pwa.subtext: It delivers the same fast, offline-ready experience you'd expect from a native app, but without the hassle of a traditional download.
pwa.platforms: Works on iOS, Android, and desktop browsers
pwa.browserNotice: Look for the install icon in your browser's address bar to add Vireo to your home screen.

beta.title: Help shape the future of Vireo.
beta.description: Join our beta program to test cloud sync and new features. Your feedback helps us build a better experience for job seekers everywhere.

pip.title: Meet Pip — your job search guide.
pip.description: Pip is here to keep your search organized, focused, and stress‑free. Think of Pip as your personal companion, helping you track every lead and follow up with confidence.

about.title: Built by job seekers, for job seekers.
about.description: Vireo was created to make job tracking simple, private, and empowering. We believe your data should stay yours — even offline.

HomePage.emptyStateDescription: Your command center is currently empty. Add your first event to start tracking your job search journey.

SignInPage.title: Enable Cloud Sync
SignInPage.signInDescription: Sign in to securely backup your job search data and access it across all your devices.
SignInPage.oauthAccountNotLinked: To confirm your identity, sign in with the same account you used originally.
SignInPage.signInError: An error occurred during sign in. Please try again.
SignInPage.termsAndPrivacy: By continuing, you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.introduction: This Privacy Policy describes how David Hamdan Teply ('we', 'us', or 'our') collects, uses, and shares your personal information when you use the Vireo application.
PrivacyPage.dataCollectionContent: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, such as your name and email address through Google or Facebook authentication. We also store the job search data you enter, including company names, roles, contacts, and events. This data is stored locally on your device and synchronized to our cloud storage if you are signed in.
PrivacyPage.usageAnalyticsContent: We use analytics services and error reporting tools (such as PostHog) to help us understand how users interact with the application and to identify and fix technical issues. These services collect anonymous information such as browser type, page views, and error logs. This data helps us ensure app stability and improve the overall user experience. If you are offline, these reports are queued locally and sent when you reconnect.
PrivacyPage.dataStorageContent: Your data is primarily stored locally in your browser. When signed in, your data is synchronized with our secure cloud database. We take reasonable measures to protect your information from unauthorized access or disclosure.
PrivacyPage.yourRightsContent: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information and job search data. You can delete your data at any time through the application settings or by contacting us.
PrivacyPage.contactUsContent: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at davehamdan@gmail.com.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.acceptanceContent: By accessing or using Vireo, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the application.
TermsPage.descriptionContent: Vireo is a tool designed to help users track their job application progress. The service is provided 'as is' and we make no guarantees regarding the availability or accuracy of the service.
TermsPage.userConductContent: You are responsible for your use of the application and for any content you provide. You agree not to use the application for any unlawful purposes or to interfere with the operation of the service.
TermsPage.limitationOfLiabilityContent: To the maximum extent permitted by law, David Hamdan Teply shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the service.
TermsPage.governingLawContent: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Texas, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
TermsPage.changesToTermsContent: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will notify you of any changes by updating the 'Last Updated' date at the top of this page.

BetaPage.title: Join the Beta Program
BetaPage.description: We're gradually rolling out Cloud Sync to ensure a smooth experience for everyone. Join the waitlist or enter your invite code to get started.
BetaPage.applyDescription: Tell us a bit about yourself and why you'd like to join.
BetaPage.reasonLabel: What do you plan to do with Vireo? (Optional)
BetaPage.applicationSuccess: Thanks for applying! We'll be in touch soon.

BetaPage.validationError: Invalid invite code. Please check and try again.
BetaPage.validationSuccess: Code validated! Redirecting to sign in...

DataDeletionPage.title: Data Deletion Instructions
DataDeletionPage.introduction: We value your privacy and provide a straightforward process for deleting your personal data from Vireo.
DataDeletionPage.howToDeleteContent: To delete your account and all associated job search data (companies, roles, contacts, and events), please follow these steps:
DataDeletionPage.stepSubject: Use the subject line: 'Data Deletion Request'
DataDeletionPage.stepDetails: Include the email address associated with your Google or Facebook account.
DataDeletionPage.processTimeContent: Once we receive your request, we will verify your identity and permanently delete your data from our secure cloud storage within 30 days. Please note that data stored locally in your browser must be cleared manually using your browser's 'Clear Browsing Data' feature.
DataDeletionPage.contactUsContent: If you have any questions about this process, please contact us at davehamdan@gmail.com.

Error.title: Well, this is awkward.
Error.description: Something didn't go as planned on our end. Please try again in a few seconds.

NotFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
